backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining core data types (Story, UserProfile, Comment, Report, etc.) and business logic for a location-based storytelling platform, including story CRUD, likes/pins, comments, search/filter, and distance calculations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old story data structures (with nested `location` object) into new flat `latitude`/`longitude` fields for stories, story-with-viewers, and drafts.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: fixing frontend feed distance filtering to use teleported or current geolocation (not uploader location), and updating CreateStoryDialog to use map-picked coordinates instead of device geolocation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key implementation details for the StoryMap application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting viewport meta, a Permissions-Policy header for geolocation on ICP domains, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, view routing (home/profile/admin/localUpdates/qissamap), profile setup modal display, and a dev-mode runtime guard that restores pointer-events if the UI becomes non-interactive.
frontend/src/components/CreateStoryDialo: A dialog component for creating and editing stories, supporting draft management (create, update, delete, publish), image upload, location picking, category selection, and anonymous posting.
frontend/src/components/CreateStoryFAB.t: A floating action button (FAB) fixed to the bottom-right corner that triggers story creation when clicked.
frontend/src/components/DistanceKmSlider: A labeled range slider component for selecting a distance in kilometers, with configurable min/max/step and an optional inactive/disabled visual state.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: A horizontal button bar for filtering stories by category, highlighting the currently selected category and supporting an 'All' option.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The app header with navigation buttons (Home, QissaMap, Local Updates), theme toggle, Internet Identity login/logout, and a user dropdown with profile and admin links.
frontend/src/components/local-updates/Cr: A dialog form for posting a local update with content, category, radius slider, and optional image, requiring the user's geolocation and submitting via a backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/local-updates/Lo: A dialog component that displays full details of a local update, including image, content, category, location, relevance, view/thumbs-up counts, and allows authors or admins to delete the update.
A settings dialog that lets users toggle mute/unmute notifications for each local update category using switches.
A floating action button (FAB) fixed to the bottom-right corner that triggers creation of a new local update.
Renders a scrollable list of local update cards with category badges, relevance indicators, timestamps, view counts, and thumbs-up buttons; clicking a card opens its detail dialog.
An interactive Leaflet map view that plots local updates as markers, shows the user's current location, and displays a selected update's details in a card overlay.
frontend/src/components/LocationPickerDi: A dialog that embeds a MapView for picking a geographic location, requesting browser geolocation to center the map and letting the user click to confirm a coordinate.
frontend/src/components/MapView.tsx: An interactive Leaflet map component that displays story markers with clustering, supports location search via Nominatim, handles click-to-select coordinates, and shows the user's current location.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to choose a username, then saves their profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/QissaMapView.tsx: A Leaflet-based map component that dynamically loads Leaflet and MarkerCluster, renders story markers with clustering, displays the user's location, and emits center-change events with debouncing.
frontend/src/components/SortControl.tsx: A dropdown UI control for selecting story sort order (newest, nearest, most viewed, most liked, most pinned), with the 'nearest' option conditionally disabled when location is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/StoryCard.tsx: A card component displaying a story preview with image, category badge, distance label, and interactive like/pin/share buttons that call backend mutations and require authentication.
frontend/src/components/StoryDetailDialo: A full-detail dialog for a story supporting view tracking, comments, like/pin/report/delete actions, and an inline edit mode with image upload, accessible to owners and admins.
frontend/src/components/StoryFeed.tsx: A responsive grid layout component that renders a list of StoryCard components, shows skeleton loaders while loading, and displays contextual empty-state messages.
frontend/src/components/WallpaperSetting: A dialog for selecting, previewing, applying, or removing a custom background wallpaper image, with file validation and object URL lifecycle management.
frontend/src/env.d.ts: TypeScript ambient declarations for Vite's `import.meta.env`, exposing the optional `VITE_II_URL` environment variable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDrafts.ts: A collection of React Query hooks for listing, fetching, creating, and updating story drafts via the backend actor, with toast notifications for success and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useForegroundLocation: React hook that tracks the user's geolocation using the browser's watchPosition API with a polling fallback, exposing location state, error, tracking status, and a manual refresh function.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocationPermiss: React hook that checks and manages browser geolocation permission state (including secure context and Permissions Policy checks), requests location, and exposes diagnostics and error details.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity state with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeafletMapResize.t: React hook that invalidates a Leaflet map's size when its container becomes visible or resizes, using ResizeObserver and multiple timed invalidations to prevent blank map rendering.
React hook that manages per-category mute preferences for local updates, persisting the muted state to localStorage and exposing toggle and query functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalUpdateNotific: React hook that monitors local updates for proximity relevance and triggers system notifications or in-app toasts for newly relevant, unmuted updates near the user's location.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalUpdates.ts: React Query-based hooks for CRUD operations on local updates, including adding updates, fetching all active updates, and fetching by proximity or category via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, stories, comments, admin checks, and mutations, with a helper to wait for the actor to become available.
frontend/src/hooks/useReverseGeocodedPla: Custom hook that reverse-geocodes a lat/lon coordinate pair into a place name, managing loading and error state with abort-on-unmount support.
frontend/src/hooks/useWallpaper.ts: Custom hook that manages a user-selected wallpaper image, persisting it as a data URL in localStorage and exposing apply/remove callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and utility styles for layout, dialogs, and the current-location map marker.
frontend/src/lib/categories.ts: Utility functions that map story Category enum values to human-readable emoji labels and Tailwind CSS color class strings.
frontend/src/lib/currentLocationMarker.t: Exports a factory function that creates a Leaflet divIcon for the current-location marker using a dot-and-ring CSS design.
frontend/src/lib/distanceFilterDebug.ts: Opt-in debug utility for distance filtering that logs filter center and per-story inclusion decisions to the console, toggled via localStorage and exposed on the window object.
frontend/src/lib/env.ts: Typed helpers for reading Vite VITE_-prefixed environment variables, with an optional fallback variant.
frontend/src/lib/leafletLoader.ts: Singleton loader for Leaflet and MarkerCluster scripts/stylesheets using reference counting to safely share and reuse global resources across components.
frontend/src/lib/localUpdates.ts: Utility functions for local updates including category label/color/icon-color mappings, radius formatting, and relevance computation based on user distance.
frontend/src/lib/locationFilter.ts: Provides proximity-based story filtering utilities using the Haversine formula, including constants for default radius and functions to check if a story's coordinates fall within a given distance of a base location.
Defines UI copy (titles, descriptions, action labels) for each geolocation permission state (idle, granted, denied, etc.) and exports a helper to retrieve copy by state.
frontend/src/lib/reverseGeocode.ts: Reverse geocodes lat/lon coordinates to a human-readable place name using the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API, with in-memory and localStorage caching to avoid redundant requests.
frontend/src/lib/startupValidation.ts: Validates critical runtime configuration (e.g., VITE_II_URL) at app startup and logs warnings to the console without blocking execution.
frontend/src/lib/storySorting.ts: Provides client-side story sorting by newest, nearest, most viewed, most liked, and most pinned, plus a converter from frontend sort options to backend SortOption types.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: General utility functions including Tailwind class merging (cn), Haversine distance calculation, and distance formatting helpers.
frontend/src/lib/wallpaperValidation.ts: Validates wallpaper file uploads for size (max 10MB) and MIME type (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF), returning typed validation results with error codes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminModerationPage.t: Admin-only dashboard page for reviewing, dismissing, and deleting reported stories, with access control based on caller admin status.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main home page that fetches and displays a filtered, sorted story feed based on the user's current or teleported location, with controls for category, distance, and sort options.
frontend/src/pages/LocalUpdatesPage.tsx: Page component for browsing and creating location-based local updates, supporting list/map views, geolocation tracking, category muting, and notifications.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile page displaying the authenticated user's posted, liked, and pinned stories in a tabbed grid layout with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/QissaMapPage.tsx: Full-screen map page that fetches nearby stories around the user's geolocation and displays them on an interactive map with a story detail dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and removing sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system with OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a location-based story feed app, its architectural rules for coordinate handling, completed features, and a pending request to ensure stories are saved with their pinned latitude/longitude.
